title: Blue Origin New Glenn Explosion | Launchpad Destruction Threatens Amazon Kuiper and NASA Lunar Architecture
subtitle: A catastrophic static fire anomaly at Cape Canaveral's LC-36 destroyed the New Glenn booster, its erector, and a primary lightning tower. All personnel are safe. The fallout reaches Amazon's internet constellation and every ULA Vulcan customer on the manifest.
thumbnail_alt: Rocket launch from Cape Canaveral illuminating the night sky

metadata.title: Blue Origin New Glenn Explosion | LC-36 Destruction 2026
metadata.description: Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket exploded during a static fire test at Cape Canaveral LC-36, destroying the pad and delaying Amazon Kuiper and NASA lunar missions.
